center.name: 瑪琅
center.summary: 瑪琅是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括赤翡翠、黑喉文鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ruddy kingfisher (Halcyon coromanda) is a medium-sized tree kingfisher, widely distributed in east and southeast Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Javan munia (Lonchura leucogastroides) is a species of estrildid finch native to southern Sumatra, Java, Bali and Lombok islands in Indonesia
